sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35977" key="e)norxe/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνορχέομαι</orth>, <sense id="n35977.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὀρχέομαι ἐν</ref></xr>. ., <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0640.tlg001:3:65" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alciphr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.65</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
